title: Apollo Reindex History
description: Telemetry rows persisted at <project>/_apollo/reindex_history.json (capped at 100 entries). Each entry is one ReindexStats record produced by graph/incremental.py and written by apollo/reindex_service.py / apollo/projects/reindex.py (see PLAN_PROJECT_BOOTSTRAP §9 and PLAN_INCREMENTAL_REINDEX).

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of the run in milliseconds

files_skipped.description: Files skipped because their content hash was unchanged

edges_resolved.description: Number of edges re-resolved during this run

edges_added.description: Edges added relative to prior graph

edges_removed.description: Edges removed relative to prior graph

bytes_written.description: Bytes written by the storage backend during persistence
